marketLabels.iconDesc: If the team you picked to win is one goal ahead at any time during the game, your bet gets settled as won, even if the opposing team eventually manages to equalize or even win the match!
If the team you picked to win is two goals ahead at any time during the game, your bet gets settled as won, even if the opposing team eventually manages to equalize or even win the match!
